TeamFlow
📊Dashboard📋Tasks⚙️Workflows🖥️Workers📈Observability👥Teams
🔧Settings

User

Teams

Manage departments and team configurations.

👥

qa

1 team

qa-automation

n8n namespace: qa/qa-automation

teams/qa/qa-automation/workflows
👥

eng

1 team

platform

n8n namespace: eng/platform

teams/eng/platform/workflows
👥

ops

1 team

incident-response

n8n namespace: ops/incident-response

teams/ops/incident-response/workflows

Run npm run bootstrap -- --departments "dept1,dept2" --create-default-teams to add departments.
